role: Co-founder of Freedom Movement of Iran
bio: Co-founder of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) alongside [Mehdi Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan) and [Mahmoud Taleghani](/people/mahmoud-taleghani) in 1961. Served in the post-revolution provisional government and the [Islamic Revolutionary Council](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-council). Father of [Ezzatollah Sahabi](/people/ezzatollah-sahabi).
